channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Spaceballs sequel will be released in April next year
item.description: There's finally a release date for the Spaceballs sequel — but before you get too excited, it's a whole year away. As first reported by Deadline, Amazon MGM Studios announced on Friday night that the upcoming Spaceballs movie will hit theaters on April 23, 2027, right around the 40th anniversary of the first film. Several members of the original cast will be reprising their roles, according to Deadline, including Mel Brooks, Rick Moranis, Bill Pullman, George Wynder and Daphne Zuniga. Spaceballs: The Release Date. April 23, 2027. pic.twitter.com/5Xv0BKmf7C— Amazon MGM Studios (@AmazonMGMStudio...

item.title: Unpacking Peter Thiel’s big bet on solar-powered cow collars
item.description: Why did Founders Fund invest $220 million in cattle management startup Halter?

item.title: Embattled startup Delve has ‘parted ways’ with Y Combinator
item.description: The controversy around Delve appears to have cost the compliance startup its relationship with accelerator Y Combinator.
